task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and returns a dictionary with keys 'bucket' and 'key'
Create a JSON policy document that allows an IAM user to read all objects from an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i- followed by 17 alphanumeric characters)
